_meta.description: Copy and labels for the Home page.

en.heroIntro: I am Rongqi Lu, an M.Eng. graduate in Control Engineering from Xidian University. My work focuses on multi-robot coordination and multi-agent reinforcement learning, helping agents communicate efficiently and explore robustly in complex environments. Beyond research, I practice AI-assisted software development and personal infrastructure engineering, from coding agents and model-service orchestration to self-hosted systems, while maintaining an engineering interest in edge devices and index-based markets.

zh.heroIntro: 陆荣琦，硕士，毕业于西安电子科技大学控制工程专业。关注多机器人协同与多智能体强化学习，帮助智能体在复杂环境中高效通信、稳健探索。研究之外，持续实践 AI 辅助软件开发与个人基础设施建设，关注从智能编码工具、模型服务编排到自托管系统的可靠落地；也长期跟踪边缘设备实验、指数化投资与加密资产，保持对技术系统和复杂市场的工程化理解。

highlights.title: 工作速览
highlights.focusValue: 多智能体强化学习、追逃博弈与 AI 辅助工程
